title: Switzerland (St. Gallen) Sole Proprietorship Commercial Register New-Registration Application — Anmeldung Neueintragung Einzelunternehmen
description: The Amt für Handelsregister und Notariate des Kantons St.Gallen's (Office for the Commercial Register and Notarial Affairs of the Canton of St. Gallen) paper application for registering a new sole proprietorship (Einzelunternehmen) in the cantonal commercial register (Handelsregister). Opens Switzerland's Business Formation vertical: the federal EasyGov.swiss one-stop-shop wizard is a confirmed dead end (login-gated on its very first screen, no unauthenticated field-level equivalent), so — following this registry's established precedent of modelling a jurisdiction's own published unauthenticated fallback when the primary online channel is authentication-gated — this schema instead models one of several structurally similar cantonal commercial-registry AcroForm PDFs (Graubünden, Aargau, Lucerne, and Appenzell Ausserrhoden all publish close siblings of the same form). St. Gallen's own version was selected after directly comparing all five for field richness and self-documenting field names: it carries the most AcroForm widgets (50, versus 32-47 for the others) with the clearest field-name/label correspondence (e.g. `Firma`, `Sitz politische Gemeinde`, `Rechtsdomizil`), rather than the terser, less self-documenting names used by some siblings (e.g. Appenzell Ausserrhoden's `Feld1`/`zb1_zb`). This schema models the form's own three-page applicant-facing content in full: the firm name and registered-office block (including the conditional c/o-address for businesses without their own premises at the registered seat), the business-purpose description, the owner's personal details, an optional additional co-signatory with their signing-authority type, the optional UID/VAT-number declaration, the identity-document-copy checklist for each named signatory, the optional register-extract order, and the non-public contact/submitter block used when the person handling the filing (e.g. the owner personally, or a fiduciary/notary acting for them) needs to be reached. It does not model the form's own page-10 wet-ink signature requirement (signatures must be publicly authenticated in person by the Office, a notary, or a municipal administration under presentation of a valid identity document — not an applicant-entered field) or the cover instruction to mail the original by post. Filing this registration is a citizen/business action performed directly with the Amt für Handelsregister und Notariate; this schema does not file the registration itself, and the live source (sg.ch) is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Swiss Confederation, the Canton of St. Gallen, or its Amt für Handelsregister und Notariate.

authority.name: Amt für Handelsregister und Notariate des Kantons St.Gallen (Office for the Commercial Register and Notarial Affairs of the Canton of St. Gallen)

source.documentRef: "Anmeldung Neueintragung Einzelunternehmen" — a 3-page fillable AcroForm PDF published unauthenticated by the Amt für Handelsregister und Notariate des Kantons St.Gallen.

verification.notes: GOV-3293 ("GovSchema Standard Research", follow-up to GOV-3288's scouting pass). Opens Switzerland's Business Formation vertical (5/6; Visa remains Switzerland's sole open vertical — sem.admin.ch's national-visa AcroForm PDF was screened this same cycle and found to be a field-for-field duplicate of the EU harmonized Schengen visa questionnaire already modelled many times in this registry, e.g. de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application — not authored as a fresh source). Source re-fetched fresh this session with two independent plain HTTP GETs (no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate): HTTP 200, 206,104 bytes both times, identical sha256 8f643f455e075e22ba76f9cb209a23f38395326b86150f9d9baab7fdbdc0a433. Extracted with pdfjs-dist v3.11.174 via getAnnotations() per page (50 /Widget annotations across 3 pages: 36 text fields, 8 radio-button options across 3 mutually-exclusive groups, 6 independent checkboxes) and getTextContent() for the surrounding prose/labels. All 50 widgets are accounted for in this schema's fields[]/documents[] below; none were dropped. Four sibling cantonal forms (Graubünden, Aargau, Lucerne, Appenzell Ausserrhoden) were fetched and widget-counted for comparison (32-47 widgets each, all structurally similar but with terser/less self-documenting field names) before selecting St. Gallen's as the richest, clearest source. See VERIFICATION.md for the full extraction record, the widget-to-field mapping, and disclosed judgment calls (notably: the two 'Kopie eines gültigen Ausweises' text fields are modelled as identity-document-holder-name fields paired with the corresponding documents[] entries, and the four independent 'Am besten erreichbar?' checkboxes are modelled as four boolean fields rather than a single enum, since the source AcroForm genuinely allows multiple simultaneous selections).

fields.name: companyName
fields.label: Firma
fields.description: The proposed name (Firma) of the sole proprietorship. The sole proprietor's family name must be included in the firm name, per the form's own instruction directly beneath this field.

fields.name: registeredOfficeMunicipality
fields.label: Sitz (politische Gemeinde)
fields.description: The political municipality (Gemeinde) that is the registered office (Sitz) of the business.

fields.name: registeredOfficeStreetAndNumber
fields.label: Rechtsdomizil — Strasse, Nr.
fields.description: The street name and house number of the business's legal domicile (Rechtsdomizil) at its registered office. A post-office box alone is not accepted as a legal domicile, per the form's own instruction.

fields.name: registeredOfficePostalCodeAndCity
fields.label: PLZ, Ort
fields.description: The postal code and locality (PLZ, Ort) of the business's legal domicile.

fields.name: domicileType
fields.label: c/o vs. eigene Räumlichkeiten
fields.description: Whether the business's legal domicile is held via a third-party domicile holder (c/o) or via its own premises (eigene Räumlichkeiten, e.g. owned or rented). If the business has no own legal domicile at the stated registered office, a c/o domicile holder must be named and must submit a declaration granting the domicile — see the `domicileHolderDeclaration` document below.
fields.sourceRef: Section 3, radio group "Gruppe1" — "c/o" / "eigene Räumlichkeiten (z.B. Eigentum, Miete)"

fields.name: domicileHolderAddress
fields.label: (c/o-Adresse)
fields.description: The name and address of the domicile holder (Domizilhalter/in) granting the business a legal domicile (c/o-Adresse) at the registered office, when the business has no legal domicile of its own there.

fields.name: businessPurpose
fields.label: Zweck
fields.description: A brief, generally understandable description of the business's activity (kurze, allgemeinverständliche Umschreibung der Geschäftstätigkeit), written across up to 8 ruled lines on the form.

fields.name: ownerFamilyName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: The family name of the sole proprietor (Geschäftsinhaber/in).
fields.sourceRef: Section 5 "Personalien des Geschäftsinhabers bzw. der Geschäftsinhaberin" — "Name"

fields.name: ownerGivenNames
fields.label: Vorname(n)
fields.description: The given name(s) of the sole proprietor.
fields.sourceRef: Section 5 "Personalien des Geschäftsinhabers bzw. der Geschäftsinhaberin" — "Vorname(n)"

fields.name: ownerHometownOrNationality
fields.label: Heimatort/Staatsangehörigkeit
fields.description: For a Swiss citizen, the sole proprietor's place of origin (Heimatort — the commune of citizenship, distinct from place of birth or residence); for a foreign national, their nationality (Staatsangehörigkeit).
fields.sourceRef: Section 5 "Personalien des Geschäftsinhabers bzw. der Geschäftsinhaberin" — "Heimatort/Staatsangehörigkeit"

fields.name: ownerResidenceAddress
fields.label: Wohnort (Adresse)
fields.description: The sole proprietor's residential address.
fields.sourceRef: Section 5 "Personalien des Geschäftsinhabers bzw. der Geschäftsinhaberin" — "Wohnort (Adresse)"

fields.name: signatureAuthorityType
fields.label: Unterschrift
fields.description: The signing-authority arrangement for the business: sole signature by the owner alone (Einzelunterschrift), joint signature by two persons (Kollektivunterschrift zu zweien), sole procuration (Einzelprokura), or joint procuration by two persons (Kollektivprokura zu zweien). A joint arrangement requires naming an additional co-signatory below.

fields.name: additionalSignatoryFamilyName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: The family name of the additional person with signing authority (Weitere Zeichnungsberechtigte), required when the signature arrangement is a joint one.

fields.name: additionalSignatoryGivenNames
fields.label: Vorname(n)
fields.description: The given name(s) of the additional co-signatory.

fields.name: additionalSignatoryHometownOrNationality
fields.label: Heimatort/Staatsangehörigkeit
fields.description: The additional co-signatory's place of origin (Heimatort) if a Swiss citizen, or nationality (Staatsangehörigkeit) if a foreign national.

fields.name: additionalSignatoryResidenceAddress
fields.label: Wohnort (Adresse)
fields.description: The additional co-signatory's residential address.

fields.name: hasUidNumber
fields.label: Haben Sie bereits eine UID-Nummer bzw. Mehrwertsteuernummer?
fields.description: Whether the business already has a Swiss Business Identification Number (UID) or VAT number.

fields.name: uidNumber
fields.label: Ja; CHE-______________________
fields.description: The business's existing UID/VAT number, entered after the form's own pre-printed "CHE-" prefix (e.g. the digits of CHE-123.456.789).
fields.sourceRef: Section 7, text field following the "Ja" checkbox

fields.name: ownerIdentityDocumentHolderName
fields.label: Kopie eines gültigen Ausweises (Pass, ID oder Ausländerausweis) — Inhaber/in
fields.description: The name of the sole proprietor whose valid identity-document copy (passport, ID card, or foreign national's residence permit) is attached, confirmed by the adjacent checkbox in the Beilagen (attachments) section.

fields.name: additionalSignatoryIdentityDocumentHolderName
fields.label: Kopie eines gültigen Ausweises (Pass, ID oder Ausländerausweis) — Weitere Zeichnungsberechtigte
fields.description: The name of the additional co-signatory whose valid identity-document copy is attached, when a joint signing arrangement names a second signatory.

fields.name: submitterFamilyName
fields.label: Name
fields.description: The family name of the contact person handling this filing (Kontaktangaben, marked "nicht öffentlich" — not published in the register). Typically the sole proprietor personally, or a fiduciary/notary/third party filing on their behalf.

fields.name: submitterGivenNames
fields.label: Vorname(n)
fields.description: The given name(s) of the filing contact person.

fields.name: submitterHometownOrNationality
fields.label: Heimatort/Staatsangehörigkeit
fields.description: The filing contact person's place of origin (Heimatort) or nationality (Staatsangehörigkeit).

fields.name: submitterResidenceAddress
fields.label: Wohnort (Adresse)
fields.description: The filing contact person's residential address.

fields.name: submitterPhoneWork
fields.label: Telefon G.
fields.description: The filing contact person's work telephone number (Telefon Geschäft).

fields.name: submitterPhonePrivate
fields.label: Telefon P.
fields.description: The filing contact person's private/home telephone number (Telefon Privat).

fields.name: submitterPhoneMobile
fields.label: M.
fields.description: The filing contact person's mobile telephone number.

fields.name: submitterEmail
fields.label: E-Mail
fields.description: The filing contact person's e-mail address.

fields.name: preferredContactViaWorkPhone
fields.label: Tel. G.
fields.description: Whether the work telephone number is the best way to reach the filing contact person. This and the three following options are independent checkboxes on the source form (not a mutually exclusive group), so more than one may genuinely be selected.

fields.name: preferredContactViaPrivatePhone
fields.label: Tel. P.
fields.description: Whether the private telephone number is the best way to reach the filing contact person.

fields.name: preferredContactViaMobile
fields.label: Mobil
fields.description: Whether the mobile number is the best way to reach the filing contact person.

fields.name: preferredContactViaEmail
fields.label: E-Mail
fields.description: Whether e-mail is the best way to reach the filing contact person.

fields.name: additionalRemarks
fields.label: Weitere Mitteilungen
fields.description: Any further remarks for the Office for the Commercial Register and Notarial Affairs, written across up to 4 ruled lines on the form.

documents.label: Kopie eines gültigen Ausweises (Pass, ID oder Ausländerausweis) — Inhaber/in
documents.sourceRef: Section 9 "Beilagen", row 1 (pre-checked "Kopie eines gültigen Ausweises" checklist item)

documents.label: Kopie eines gültigen Ausweises (Pass, ID oder Ausländerausweis) — Weitere Zeichnungsberechtigte
Erklärung des/der Domizilhalter/in
documents.sourceRef: Section 3, cover instruction: "Mit der Anmeldung ist eine Erklärung des/der Domizilhalter/in einzureichen, dass sie bzw. er der Rechtseinheit ein Rechtsdomizil an deren Sitz gewährt."

documents.label: Handelsregisterauszug nach Publikation im Schweizerischen Handelsamtsblatt
documents.sourceRef: Section 8 "Bestellungen" — pre-checked by default on the source form; the form's own instruction is to cross it out if not desired ("falls nicht gewünscht, bitte durchstreichen").
